purpose: Convert governance visibility into enforced non-bypassable boundaries in safe stages.

stages.name: visibility
stages.description: Governance artifacts, scorecards, and coverage tests exist.

stages.name: advisory checks
stages.description: Workflows detect governed mutations and validate governance artifacts, but branch protection does not require them yet.

stages.name: required status checks
stages.description: merge-governance-check becomes required for PRs into main.

stages.name: branch-protected enforcement
stages.description: Direct push is restricted, PRs are required, required checks must pass, and admin bypass policy is explicit.

stages.name: runtime-boundary enforcement
stages.description: Production deploy, execution, proof, replay, and merge governance are all bound to exact objects and proof.

stages.name: non-bypassable enforcement
stages.description: No alternate path to source-control, deploy, schema, or runtime mutation exists outside governed boundaries.

blocked_until: merge governance check validates PREO/SCO candidates
branch protection policy is explicitly documented

first_enforcement_targets.current_state: governed but external bypasses must be proven closed
first_enforcement_targets.required_control: Prove direct wrangler deploy cannot reach production outside governed-deploy.yml

first_enforcement_targets.current_state: runtime governed but proof closure requires continuous tests
first_enforcement_targets.required_control: Execution cannot be considered complete without proof persistence
blocked_until: proof failure returns NULL or non-complete execution state

non_bypassability_checks: no merge without required status checks
no governed path mutation without SCO
no PR merge legitimacy without PREO
no schema migration outside SCO/PREO governance
